narrative:
Reed Twp township has 524 registered voters, with 48.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.1 percentage points.
